data.headline: Chicago Loft Living Starts Here
data.body: I'm Marcus Chen — a licensed Chicago real estate broker specializing in loft conversions, timber-frame units, and modern condos across Logan Square, Wicker Park, Bucktown, and the West Loop. I help buyers and sellers navigate Chicago's most sought-after neighborhoods with market expertise and a hands-on approach.

data.title: What I Offer
data.subtitle: Specialized service for Chicago's loft and condo market.

items.title: Loft Market Analysis
items.description: Detailed pricing reports using comparable loft sales, building assessments, and neighborhood-level appreciation trends.

items.title: Building Due Diligence
items.description: Full HOA financials review, reserve fund analysis, and special assessment history before you commit.

items.title: Negotiation Strategy
items.description: Proven tactics for winning in multi-offer situations — I've secured over 30 deals below asking this year.

items.title: Seller Staging & Marketing
items.description: Professional photography, 3D tours, and targeted digital marketing to showcase your space to the right buyers.

items.title: Investment Analysis
items.description: Rental yield projections, Airbnb potential assessments, and long-term appreciation forecasts for investor clients.

data.title: How It Works
data.subtitle: Three steps to your next loft.

steps.title: Share Your Vision
steps.description: Tell me what you're looking for — loft style, neighborhood, budget, and must-haves.

steps.title: Get Your Market Report
steps.description: Receive a personalized analysis with comparable sales, pricing trends, and my honest take on the market.

steps.title: Tour & Close
steps.description: Schedule private showings, make your move, and I'll handle everything through closing day.

data.title: Recent Sales
data.subtitle: Closed deals across Chicago's hottest loft neighborhoods.

data.title: Client Reviews
data.subtitle: What past clients say about working with me.

items.text: Marcus found us the perfect timber-loft in Logan Square within two weeks. His knowledge of the building's history and HOA financials gave us total confidence. Couldn't be happier.
We were first-time buyers overwhelmed by the Chicago market. Marcus broke everything down, helped us negotiate $18K off asking, and made the whole process feel easy.
Sold our West Loop condo in 5 days at full asking price. Marcus's staging advice and marketing plan were next-level. Highly recommend for anyone in the loft market.

data.title: What's Your Property Worth?
data.subtitle: Get a free Chicago market analysis in minutes.
data.description: Enter your address below and I'll send you a detailed market analysis with comparable sales, price trends, and my professional valuation. **100% free, no strings.**

data.title: About Marcus
bio: I'm Marcus Chen — a licensed real estate broker with Urban Loft Realty, focused exclusively on Chicago's loft, condo, and converted-space market. Over 12 years and 200+ transactions, I've built deep expertise in the neighborhoods where industrial meets modern.

My approach combines market data with genuine neighborhood knowledge. I grew up on the Northwest Side, went to school in Wicker Park, and have watched these neighborhoods evolve. That context matters when you're making the biggest purchase of your life.
When I'm not showing lofts, you'll find me at local coffee shops, cycling the 606 trail, or exploring Chicago's food scene.

thank_you.heading: Thank You!
thank_you.subheading: Your Market Analysis Is Being Prepared
thank_you.body: {firstName} will send your personalized Chicago market report to your email shortly.
thank_you.disclaimer: This report is a Comparative Market Analysis (CMA) and is not an appraisal.
